title: ilex paraguariensis f. latifolia
intro: Ilex paraguariensis f. latifolia is a variety of the Ilex paraguariensis plant, also known as South American holly or yerba mate, which is a type of evergreen holly native to the subtropical regions of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex paraguariensis f. latifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Ilex paraguariensis f. latifolia is commonly prepared as a traditional herbal tea, known as yerba mate, which is brewed by infusing the dried leaves and stems of the plant in hot water.
